verification_summary: Initial project structure and implementation plan drafted successfully.

implemented: Drafted 01_plan.md specifying architectural design, data flows, components, and risks for the project.
risks: Potential yfinance Rate Limiting or service changes from Yahoo Finance.
Data availability differences between stock tickers and ETF tickers causing empty grid items.
future_improvements: Introduce a persistent database cache (SQLite) if the in-memory cache is insufficient.
Explore Electron packaging for fully standalone Windows executable distribution.
decisions: Chose yfinance library for fetching data without requiring any API keys.
Decided to proxy the Yahoo Finance Autocomplete API from the FastAPI backend to support instant search suggestions.
Adopted Recharts for standard rendering of interactive high-performance charts in React.
